title: Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada service standards - Canada.ca
content:
## Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada service standards
This report covers the 2024–2025 fiscal year. A fiscal year runs from April 1 to March 31.
The service standards apply only to applications with complete information and all the required supporting documents.
- Passport and other travel document services
- Temporary residence applications
- Applications related to inadmissibility
- Permanent residence applications
- Grants and contributions
- Client Support Centre

## Passport and other travel document services
Our service standard
Service standard introduced
Service standard reviewed
Passport application in person at a passport office
Passport application by mail

2 to 9 business days

## Client Support Centre
Our service standard
Service standard introduced
Acknowledge receipt of web form enquiries (emails) within 1 business day. Answer them within 3 business days if coordination with other offices or additional follow-up is not required, and otherwise, respond case by case.
Answered 19% of web form enquiries within 3 business days
50% of calls requesting an agent get into the queue
Callers wait 30 minutes or less once in the queue
